name: @provekit/ts-types-proof
description: Drop-in shim that adds the ProvekIt protocol substrate to TypeScript projects. Wraps @provekit/ir-symbolic; auto-registers V8 bridge declarations at module load. Deprecates when upstream ts-types adopts the protocol natively.

provekit.deprecatesWhen: upstream ts-types adopts the protocol natively
provekit.comment: 13 bridge declarations register on module load; the IR ctor names hash to the same canonical bytes whether produced by ts-types-proof or by a future protocol-aware ts-types. Migration is a one-line dependency swap with no proof chain breaks.
